📌 Sourcing Instructions:

Cluster-Based Primary Sourcing

Identify the global manufacturing cluster for the product in question (e.g., cotton = Bangladesh, bearings = Germany/Japan, etc.).

Source directly from manufacturers in this cluster to ensure competitive pricing and quality.

Global Sourcing Alternatives

Identify all other international suppliers offering the same or alternative OEM product on EX-WORKS basis.

Source from countries providing the lowest price, with no restriction on location.

Alternate OEMs Allowed

If no OEM is specified, suggest suitable alternative OEMs from reliable and cost-effective sources.

If OEM is specified, also suggest equivalent or better alternatives if allowed by client preferences.

Supplier Details

Provide verified contact information (preferably sales email and LinkedIn) of at least 2–3 suppliers per product.

Use all available sources: trade directories, LinkedIn, Alibaba, import/export data, supply maps, B2B directories.

📋 RFQ Analysis

Extract and summarize the critical points of the RFQ in structured format:

Product name and description

Quantity

Delivery deadline

Delivery instructions (if any)

Bid closing date (if provided)

💰 Price Estimation & Logistics

Act as a top global cost estimation expert.

Estimate the EX-WORKS price from the shortlisted suppliers.

Provide DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) estimate to Hadeed Plant in Jubail, Saudi Arabia.

Show total item weight, estimated freight, customs, and duties breakdown.

📈 Final Recommendation

For each recommended supplier or country, state clearly:

Why this product is competitively sourced from that country or supplier

Factors like labor cost, material availability, logistics efficiency, or regulatory advantages

👤 Assignment and Action

Assign the final query to Mr. Rais

Generate a brief, professional email including full RFQ details to send to the supplier. The email should include:

Product inquiry

Quantity required

Required documentation

EX-WORKS price request

Delivery time

Clarification on OEM or alternate OEM acceptance

🧩 Kit Seals & Technical Inference

If the product is a kit seal or similar, auto-generate a technical drawing or schematic using inferred or standard dimensions.

Use existing catalog data or industry norms if exact dimensions are not available.

RFQ Summary

List of Top 3 Suppliers with contact info

Product weight
